# Bespoke Woodcraft Studio

> Custom furniture design and content creation agency for woodworkers and makers. We build bespoke furniture from exotic and domestic hardwoods, and we help other woodworkers grow their businesses through professional video content and storytelling.

## About
- [Home](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/): Custom furniture studio offering bespoke designs, cabinetry, and personalized consultations with founder Ahmed Hamade
- [Project Intake](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/project-intake): Start a custom furniture project with a free 30-minute design consultation

## What We Do
- [Custom Furniture](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/#services): Bespoke furniture crafted from exotic and domestic hardwoods including white oak, walnut, maple, and cherry. Each piece designed collaboratively with the client.
- [Cabinet Solutions](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/#services): Custom cabinetry designed to fit your space and style, built with traditional joinery and modern precision.
- [Content for Makers](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/#services): Done-for-you video production and content strategy for woodworkers and makers who want to grow their audience and business through content.

## Key Information
- [FAQ](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/#faq): Common questions about our process, timelines (4-8 weeks typical), lifetime warranty on joints and structural integrity, and our Perfect Fit Guarantee
- [Gallery](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/#gallery): Portfolio of completed bespoke furniture including dining tables, dressers, chairs, and custom pieces

## Contact
- [Email](mailto:info@bespokewoodcraftstudio.com): General inquiries and project discussions
- [Book a Call](https://bespokewoodcraftstudio.com/project-intake): Free 30-minute design consultation to discuss your project
- [Instagram](https://instagram.com/bespokewoodcraftstudio): Behind-the-scenes shop content and finished pieces
- [Facebook](https://facebook.com/bespokewoodcraftstudio): Community updates and project showcases
- [TikTok](https://tiktok.com/@bespokewoodcraftstudio): Short-form woodworking process videos
- [X / Twitter](https://x.com/bespokewoodcraft): Woodworking insights and maker community

## Company Details
- **Founded by:** Ahmed Hamade
- **Location:** United States
- **Specialties:** Custom furniture, exotic hardwoods, content creation for makers
- **Warranty:** Lifetime coverage on joints and structural integrity
- **Typical Timeline:** 4-8 weeks from design consultation to delivery
- **Philosophy:** Furniture that feels like it was designed just for you — because it was. We believe the best marketing for makers is showing the work.
